message:
feat(engine): add prepared execution context, decision contract linkage, and category shift reporting

Refactor ExecutionOrchestrator to support preflighted runtime-flow guards
via prepare_next_runtime_flow_guards(), enabling callers to mint and stage
declassification receipts before execute(). Key changes:

- execution_orchestrator: add PreparedRuntimeFlowGuards,
  ReservedExecutionContext, staged declassification receipts, trusted
  authorizer registry, and PreparedExecutionContextMismatch error variant
- flow_lattice: add decision_id linkage to Ir2FlowLattice, emit
  structured receipt-blocked events on untrusted/invalid receipts
- declassification_pipeline: add decision_contract_id field to
  DeclassificationRequest and DeclassificationReceipt
- causal_intervention_dag: fix instrument validity check to use explicit
  path search excluding treatment node instead of descendants set
- module_resolver: add OutsideRoot registry error and workspace root
  boundary enforcement; refactor error handling from ? to match blocks
- ifc_artifacts, frankenlab_surface_gap_matrix, lowering_pipeline:
  adapt to new flow lattice decision linkage API
- lib.rs: register category_shift_report module
- category_shift_report: new module for category shift analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
